title: Timeline End Date to set deadline date by X days
excerpt: I’m looking for a way to set a Deadline date triggered by the end date in a timeline column. For example Time line runs April 1 - April 30 I want to set a deadline date 30 days in the future automatically. I want to use …

posts.author: PhillAllen (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking for a way to set a Deadline date triggered by the end date in a timeline column. For example Time line runs April 1 - April 30 I want to set a deadline date 30 days in the future automatically. I want to use deadline mode to trigger notifications for upcoming and overdue task tied to that deadline. Can someone point me in the right direction on how to make this happen?

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
